applicationAdvancedResources.title: Resources
applicationAdvancedResources.description: If you want to decrease or increase the resources to a specific application or database
applicationAdvancedResources.alertRedeploy: Please remember to click Redeploy after modify the resources to apply the changes.

tooltip.memoryLimit: Memory hard limit in bytes. Example: 1GB = 1073741824 bytes. Use +/- buttons to adjust by 256 MB.
tooltip.memoryReservation: Memory soft limit in bytes. Example: 256MB = 268435456 bytes. Use +/- buttons to adjust by 256 MB.
tooltip.cpuLimit: CPU quota in units of 10^-9 CPUs. Example: 2 CPUs = 2000000000. Use +/- buttons to adjust by 0.25 CPU.
tooltip.cpuReservation: CPU shares (relative weight). Example: 1 CPU = 1000000000. Use +/- buttons to adjust by 0.25 CPU.
tooltip.ulimits: Set resource limits for the container. Each ulimit has a soft limit (warning threshold) and hard limit (maximum allowed). Use -1 for unlimited.

ulimits.label: Ulimits
ulimits.emptyHint: No ulimits configured. Click "Add Ulimit" to set resource limits.
